model.quantization: F32 Safetensors with 811049984 parameters plus an official NeMo checkpoint
model.license: CC-BY-4.0; redistribution and commercial use require attribution

runtime.version: NeMo main at the evaluated model revision
runtime.boundary: official Python/NeMo path on NVIDIA GPU platforms

energy.notes: No accepted Apple-local runtime reached inference.

engineering_cost.conversion_effort: Safetensors make weights inspectable, but an owned Apple path still needs the complete FastConformer, decoder, tokenizer, timestamp, and streaming behavior.
engineering_cost.update_cost: Cuttledoc would own model conversion and architecture parity because the official supported runtime is NeMo.
engineering_cost.packaging_cost: The official Python/PyTorch/NeMo stack is incompatible with the thin native product artifact.

reproduction.command: No benchmark command: the pinned official model has no accepted Apple-local runtime.

result.blocker: The CC-BY-4.0 weights are available as Safetensors, but NVIDIA supports inference through NeMo on NVIDIA-oriented hardware rather than MLX or CoreML. A community port cannot become the product runtime without a separate ADR-0005 acceptance or an owned official-MLX implementation.
observations: The original canary-1b non-commercial license does not apply to canary-1b-flash.
The model covers only four of the evaluated languages and does not cover Portuguese.
Community MLX code can inform a future owned port but is not production evidence.
